title: Fix: INC-129
note:
Auto-created from incident INC-129: Gateway log shows 30 rate limit (429) errors. Free model pool may be exhausted.

── RCA ──
Root cause: OpenRouter free model pool exhausted — too many requests in short window
Confidence: 90% (2h SLA)
File: openclaw.json
Fix: Enable FreeRide auto-switching for fallback models. Add exponential backoff to cron jobs.

title: Fix: INC-128
note:
Auto-created from incident INC-128: Detected 5 session files with takeover errors in the last hour. Gateway may be in a crash loop.

── RCA ──
Root cause: Gateway session lock conflict — embedded prompt released while session file was modified
Confidence: 80% (2h SLA)
File: openclaw.json
Fix: Update OpenClaw to latest version. Reduce concurrent cron jobs that access session files.
